word: H7511 - רָפַס - râphaç - raw-fas' - Humble self

sections.paragraph:
Original: רפס

Transliteration: râphas

Phonetic: raw-fas'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Hithpael)
    1. to stamp oneself down, humble oneself
    2. stamping or tramping down (participle)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2199

Part(s) of speech: Verb
